title: Skill Junction Unification — Single Source of Truth
summary: Repair 49 broken Codex junctions and establish lazy vault as single source of truth for all 54 skills. Bridge 4 always-on skills into vault via junctions, replace individual skill-level junctions with parent-level directory junctions in Codex and .agents, and add skill/ to plugin basePaths.
keyOutcomes: Codex sees all 54 skills through single parent junction
.agents sees all 54 skills through single parent junction
Adding new skills to vault requires zero junction maintenance
risks: Name collision if always-on skills already exist in vault (mitigated by Phase 0 pre-check)
Directory locked by running Codex process during junction replacement (mitigated by close-first instruction)
Plugin basePaths change causes duplicate skill entries (mitigated by rollback procedure)
deliverables: 4 bridge junctions in lazy vault pointing to always-on skills
Zero broken junctions across all skill directories
validationCriteria: Zero broken junctions in Codex or .agents
Plugin config has 2 basePaths and valid JSON
